summary: Iteration 2 — Clientes & Serviços catalog + historical import. Backend: 29/29 pytest tests PASS (test_clientes_servicos_api.py + test_orcamentos_api.py). Frontend e2e mobile (390x844): 4 tabs render (Orçamentos/Novo/Clientes/Definições). Orçamentos tab shows 6 historical (2026105-2026110) total 11 700,00 €. Clientes tab shows 5 seeded clients with avatars/search/add-btn/trash. Novo screen: cliente-picker opens, lists all 5 clients, tapping Clara fills form (cliente-nome='Clara'). Servico-picker (Catálogo) lists 13 historical serviços incl. 'Lavar e aplicação de massa WEBER', tapping pre-fills draft-descricao + draft-preco. Auto-record verified: POSTing orçamento with new cliente/servico creates them; repeating increments uso_count without duplicating cliente. Bulk import is idempotent (skips existing numero). Cleaned up TEST_ artifacts left over from previous test runs.

issues: Hot reload triggered during test — UI was updated from a small 'Escolher existente' pill to large 'Cliente Existente / Cliente Novo' selector cards. Both versions work; just noting that the testID 'cliente-picker-btn' is still attached and functional.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated style props: 'shadow*' (use 'boxShadow') and 'props.pointerEvents' (use 'style.pointerEvents'). Source not pinpointed — likely from a vendor component. Reference: browser console logs.

action_items: Counter for orc_2026 was bumped to 2026204 by automated tests. If main agent wants the next visible number to be 2026111, run: db.counters.update_one({'_id':'orc_2026'},{'$set':{'seq':110}}). Otherwise no functional impact.

Old test file test_orcamentos_api.py creates TEST_Cliente Lda / TEST_Seq via POST /api/orcamentos which auto-records them as clientes/servicos. The new test file already cleans them up, but consider deleting the auto-recorded cliente/servico from the older test as well (already cleaned manually this run).
Investigate deprecated style prop warnings (shadow* and pointerEvents) — low priority but accumulates in dev console.
Cliente picker uses testID pattern 'pick-cliente-{nome}' (by name, not id). Works but is fragile if two clients share the same first chars. Consider switching to id-based pattern like servico picker.
critical_code_review_comments: _auto_record_cliente uses regex '^name$' with case-insensitive match — name containing regex special chars (e.g., parentheses) could break. Consider re.escape().

_auto_record_servicos overwrites preco_unitario/iva/unidade from latest orcamento every time uso_count is incremented. This is acceptable but means catalog price can drift from a historical orçamento.
Frontend search in Clientes filters by c.nif.includes(search) and c.contacto.includes(search) without null/case guards — fine because backend always returns strings, but worth defensive coding.
POST /api/orcamentos returns 409 on duplicate numero but POST /api/orcamentos/import silently skips — inconsistent UX; fine for bulk import but worth a returned 'skipped' list.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Cleaned up leftover TEST_Cliente Lda, TEST_Seq, Cliente Teste Clone, and stale servicos (Pintura/Material/Isento) from previous test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend counter for orc_2026 is at 204 (next-number 2026205). All 6 historical orçamentos (2026105-2026110) are intact, total 11 700 €. 5 clientes and 13 catalog serviços (+1 leftover 'Teste' servico from prior manual testing — not deleted, harmless). Both test files in /app/backend/tests/ should be used for regression. testIDs: tab-{orcamentos|novo|clientes|definicoes}, cliente-picker-btn (renders even after recent UI change), servico-picker-btn, pick-cliente-{nome}, pick-servico-{id}, add-cliente-btn, cliente-card-{id}, cliente-delete-{id}, search-cliente, form-{nome|nif|contacto|morada|notas}, save-cliente-btn.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in scoped features.
